title: Olympia Bead Dessert Fork St/St (Box 12) & Olympia Bead Dessert Knife St/St (Box 12)
description: From the manufacturer Olympia Bead Cutlery Dessert Forks (Pack of 12), 185(L)mm, 18/0 Stainless Steel, High Polished Finish, Dishwasher Safe, Table Dining Forks, Restaurants Pubs Bars Bistros Cafés or Home Use | C128 Upgrade your dining experience with the Olympia Bead Dessert Forks (Pack of 12), crafted from premium 18/0 stainless steel and finished with a lustrous high polish shine. The beautiful beaded border on the handle exudes an aura of elegance and class that will compliment any table setting, whether for fancy dinner parties or simple family gatherings. Designed to perfection, these dessert forks are 185mm long and offer a perfect balance between form and functionality. They are the ideal size for serving delicate desserts like cakes, pies or pastries. With its sleek design and durable material, it will instantly elevate your dining experience and leave your guests in awe. Sold in packs of 12, these dessert forks offer excellent value for money. They are suitable for commercial use such as in bars, hotels, restaurants or cafes that pride themselves on quality homemade food. But why limit yourself? You can add an extra touch of sophistication to your own home meals as well. In summary, the Olympia Bead Dessert Forks (Pack of 12) is an essential addition to any cutlery collection. Its timeless design is sure to impress your guests and elevate any mealtime experience. So go ahead, indulge yourself and order now. Material Stainless Steel Color Silver Brand Olympia Number Of Pieces 1 Finish Type Polished Olympia 9400 C127 Bead Dessert Knife (Pack of 12) The instantly recognisable Bead design is widely used around the world and will complement any table setting in any bar, hotel, restaurant or café that prides themselves on traditional, homemade food. This dessert knife is slightly smaller than a table knife and is perfect for use with cake or served with afternoon tea.
